description_long: This object is a large, heavy-duty rifle mounted on a two-wheeled carriage, resembling a crew-served weapon such as a heavy machine gun or anti-materiel rifle. The main body is robust and rectangular, with a long, cylindrical barrel extending from one end, indicating high-caliber ammunition capability. The carriage features two solid wheels for transport and a stabilizing leg or support for stationary firing. There are visible handles and a trigger mechanism, as well as a side-mounted box or magazine for ammunition feeding. The surface is matte black or dark gray, with a metallic sheen, and the construction appears to be primarily steel or similar metal. The overall design is utilitarian, built for durability and sustained use in urban or field environments.
description: A large, wheeled heavy rifle with a long barrel, robust metal body, and side-mounted magazine, designed for stationary or crew-served use. The surface is matte black and metallic, with visible handles and support structures.
description_view_0: The rifle is viewed from the muzzle end, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the two wheels aligned behind it.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the full length of the barrel, the rectangular receiver, the side-mounted magazine, and the two supporting wheels.
description_view_2: Viewed from the rear, the handle, trigger area, and the back of the receiver are visible, with the wheels flanking the body.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the long barrel, receiver, and carriage, with the support leg and wheels clearly visible.
